report.title: Executive Robot Performance Report
report.disclaimer: Figures are generated automatically from robot telemetry for the reporting period. Final confirmation and any service action require RAASPAL verification and/or an on-site survey.

common.tagline: AI-powered robot recommendation for your workspace

items.importedDatasheet: RAAS PAL team imported robot datasheet
items.agodaReady: Agoda requirement marked ready for matching

hero.title: Generate a Robot Solution
hero.description: Upload a customer survey and let AI extract requirements, match robots from the catalog, and draft a ready-to-send proposal — in minutes.

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.step1Description: Upload an Excel, PDF, or image of the customer requirements form.
howItWorks.step2Description: Claude AI reads the survey and structures the customer requirements automatically.
howItWorks.step3Description: The AI compares requirements against the verified robot catalog and ranks the best options.
howItWorks.step4Description: Select a robot option and the AI drafts a full customer proposal ready for review.

cvteSummary.heading: Robot Online Status
cvteSummary.empty: No CVTE devices synced yet — visit CVTE C3 Status to add some.

workspace.title: Create a robot solution from customer inputs.
workspace.description: Capture the customer profile, operating environment, and cleaning priorities before generating a ranked robot recommendation.

hub.title: Start by selecting the workflow the customer needs.
hub.description: Each solution type opens a focused intake form so the recommendation engine can compare the right robots for the job.

concierge.title: Factory Robot Solution
concierge.description: Match robots for factory and warehouse environments — material handling, patrol, and industrial operations.

profile.title: Customer profile
profile.detail: Basic account and site data captured

cleaning.title: Solution for Cleaning
cleaning.headline: Enter cleaning requirements to generate robot recommendations.
cleaning.description: Use this form when the customer needs autonomous cleaning for malls, hotels, offices, warehouses, or shared facilities.

delivery.title: Solution for Delivery
delivery.headline: Enter delivery requirements to generate robot recommendations.
delivery.description: Use this form when the customer needs robots for food, parcels, amenities, medicine, or indoor item transport.

placeholders.handoff: Staff pickup, customer PIN, elevator handoff

mowing.title: Solution for Mowing
mowing.headline: Enter mowing requirements to generate robot recommendations.
mowing.description: Use this form when the customer needs autonomous mowing for lawns, parks, golf courses, or outdoor areas.

concierge.title: Solution for Factory
concierge.headline: Enter factory or warehouse requirements to generate robot recommendations.
concierge.description: Use this form when the customer needs robots for industrial environments — material handling, patrol, or warehouse operations.

upload.fileTypes: PDF, Excel (.xlsx / .xls), PNG, JPG · Max 20 MB
upload.unsupportedFile: Unsupported file type. Please upload PDF, Excel, PNG, or JPG.
upload.disclaimer: AI extraction requires RAASPAL verification before the proposal is sent to the customer.
upload.solutionNameRequired: Please enter a solution name before generating.

recommendation.title: Robot Recommendations
recommendation.heading: AI-Generated Robot Recommendations
recommendation.description: The AI compared the customer requirements against the verified robot catalog. Select the best fit to generate the proposal.
recommendation.loadingSub: AI is comparing requirements against the robot catalog
recommendation.noRequirementId: No requirement ID found. Please upload the survey file again.
recommendation.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while generating recommendations
recommendation.verificationNote: Final selection requires RAASPAL team verification and site survey.

proposal.title: Generated Proposal
proposal.heading: Customer Proposal
proposal.description: The AI-generated proposal below is based on the selected robot and customer requirements. Review and verify before sending to the customer.
proposal.loadingSub: AI is preparing the customer proposal document
proposal.errorMissingData: Missing recommendation or robot ID. Please start from the upload step.
proposal.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while generating the proposal
proposal.noContent: No content returned. The backend AI provider may need configuration.
proposal.verificationBody: This proposal was AI-generated from customer requirements and the robot catalog. Final specifications, pricing, and site suitability must be confirmed by RAASPAL team and an on-site survey before presenting to the customer.

syncForm.heading: Sync devices from Kava
syncForm.description: Search the Kava Open Gateway by factory SN, device name, or org code to start tracking matching devices.

panel.heading: Monthly report automation
panel.description: Each robot's monthly cleaning report is generated as an Excel file, hosted, and delivered to the customer over LINE — one message per customer with a download link for each robot.

reports.autoNote: If automatic sending is enabled on the server, reports go out on their own after each month ends. You don't need to do anything here unless you want to send early or re-send.
reports.confirmBody: This generates each robot's report for {month} and sends a real LINE message to every customer with a recipient set. LINE push messages may incur cost.
reports.errorCounts: {robotErrors} file error(s), {sendErrors} send error(s) — see server logs.
reports.emptyResult: No robot task reports found for {month}. Nothing to generate.
reports.errorGeneric: The report run failed. Please try again.

home.heroTitle: Find the Right Robot for Your Business
home.heroSubtitle: Tell us about your workspace and our AI engine will match you with the best-fit cleaning robots from our verified catalog.
home.feature1Desc: AI scores every robot against your hard constraints and soft preferences.
home.feature2Desc: Every robot spec is tested and validated by the RAASPAL team.
home.feature3Desc: Get a detailed proposal with ranked robots, scores, and AI explanations.
